The '''Hifold Sensory Package''', manufactured by [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]], was a cybernetic implant package that enhanced the eyes and ears.<ref name="CRFG">[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]</ref>

Using a combination of true-fleck brain implants and artificial hypergleamum glands to increase the brain's capacity to handle extra sensory input and keep it organized, the Hifold sensory package enhanced all aspects of perception by way of superior visual and aural acuity.<ref name="CRFG" />

In addition, the implant also allowed the user to interpret body language much better; with the implant the user became acutely aware of changes in breathing patterns and subtle changes in eye patterns, with a user being able to interpret this data to tremendous advantage.<ref name="CRFG" />

==Notable users==
*[[Cragus 12]]<ref name="Star Wars Adventure Journal 3">{{JournalCite|3|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref>
*[[Equa Felens]]<ref name="FGS">''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''</ref>
*[[Yarr Gatonne]]<ref name="Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''</ref><ref name="Wanted By Cracken">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref>
